channel.title: Homelab on Ricardo Ribeiro
channel.description: Recent content in Homelab on Ricardo Ribeiro

item.title: Homelab #2: Wazuh SIEM/XDR - Attack Simulation & Active Response
item.description: Building a more advanced Wazuh lab on VirtualBox with Sysmon integration, real attack simulations, and automated Active Response until I hit the wall of my current skill level.

item.title: Homelab #1: Raspberry Pi 4 — Pi-hole, Tailscale & Jellyfin
item.description: How I turned a Raspberry Pi 4 into a home DNS filter, VPN node, and media server.
